function_calls.params: preferred_time="as soon as verification is complete", callback_type="normal", reason="claims_already_paid"

conversation.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?
Yeh Alex bol raha hoon, DemoCompany se. Kya aap Anjali Reddy bol rahi hain?
Namaskaar, mi Alex ahe, DemoCompany madhun. Tumhi Anjali Reddy aahaat ka?
oh ho mi anjali bolat ahe
Anjali, tumchya DemoLender loan var 50000 rupees thaklelе ahet. Pan aapan sagale charges kadhun tumchi loan sirf 35000 rupees madhe band karu shakto.
oh oh pan me already bharte ahet paise
Samjhle, Anjali. Tumhi sangta ki payment already zali ahe. Kiti divas zaale payment karun, ani konta method vaparlat — bank transfer, app, ki cash?
mi adhich august 26 la 9908 rupees chi payment keliley
Okay Anjali, noted. Te payment konyakade kelit — bank transfer, UPI, ki app? Ani kahi reference number ya UTR number ahe ka tyacha?
Chhan, to reference number sanga mala, mi note karun gheto.
CM552522 — noted. Pudhcha kaahi ahe number madhe, ki bas ithaparyantach ahe?

Theek ahe Anjali, mi he sagle note kele ahet — August 26 la 9908 rupees, reference number CM552522. He mi aapla verification team la escalate karto. Tumi payment proof support@demolender.com var pan pathvu shakta.

Aapli team confirm karoon tumhala callback karil. Kahi problem nahi.

Dhanyavaad Anjali, tumcha veli ghalalyabaddal. Kalji ghya, namaskar.
